docket_entries.description: JUDGE THOMAS M. KELLY THOMAS P. WRIGHT, JR. FOR THE PLTF. DEFT NOT PRESENT. 9:45 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT. PWS&E SHAWN HOLLEY PLTF'S EXH. # 1 - 3 DAY NOTICE ID JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTIT. OF THE PREMISES AT 626 POLK STREET, #104, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED, FOR $1,171.24 RENTS/DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTYS FEES WAIVED. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT. EXH. W/DRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK, L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWSON, ALAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POLK STREET, #104, SF CA 94102 $1,171.24 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,171.24, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS & ATTYS FEES WAIVED.
